sentences.text_original: 你最近买了很多东西吗？我看你经常收快递。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zuìjìn mǎi le hěn duō dōngxi ma? Wǒ kàn nǐ jīngcháng shōu kuàidì.
sentences.text_translation: Yaqinda ko'p narsa sotib oldingmi? Tez-tez pochta olayotganingni ko'ryapman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты в последнее время много покупаешь? Я вижу, ты часто получаешь посылки.
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you bought a lot lately? I see you getting deliveries all the time.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，我最近喜欢在网上买东西。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, wǒ zuìjìn xǐhuān zài wǎngshàng mǎi dōngxi.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, yaqinda internetdan xarid qilishni yoqtirib qoldim.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, мне в последнее время нравится покупать в интернете.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, lately I've been into shopping online.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 很方便。不用出门，在家就能选。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn fāngbiàn. Búyòng chūmén, zài jiā jiù néng xuǎn.
sentences.text_translation: Juda qulay. Uydan chiqmasdan, uyda turib tanlash mumkin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень удобно. Не нужно выходить из дома — можно выбирать прямо дома.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very convenient. No need to go out — you can choose right from home.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你不怕买到不好的东西吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ bú pà mǎi dào bù hǎo de dōngxi ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А ты не боишься купить что-то некачественное?
sentences.text_translation_en: Aren't you afraid of ending up with something bad?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 有一点担心。所以我都会看别人的评价。
sentences.pinyin: Yǒu yì diǎn dānxīn. Suǒyǐ wǒ dōu huì kàn biérén de píngjià.
sentences.text_translation: Bir oz xavotirlanaman. Shuning uchun har doim boshqalarning sharhlarini o'qiyman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Немного переживаю. Поэтому всегда читаю отзывы других.
sentences.text_translation_en: A little worried. So I always read other people's reviews.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 很有用。好的评价多，说明东西不错。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn yǒuyòng. Hǎo de píngjià duō, shuōmíng dōngxi búcuò.
sentences.text_translation: Juda foydali. Yaxshi sharhlar ko'p bo'lsa, demak narsa yaxshi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень полезны. Если хороших отзывов много, значит товар хороший.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very useful. Lots of good reviews means the product is decent.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ zài wǎngshàng mǎi guo yīfu ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you ever bought clothes online?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 买过。但是衣服比较难选，大小不合适就要退。
sentences.pinyin: Mǎi guo. Dànshì yīfu bǐjiào nán xuǎn, dàxiǎo bù héshì jiù yào tuì.
sentences.text_translation: Olganman. Lekin kiyimni tanlash ancha qiyin, o'lchami to'g'ri kelmasa qaytarish kerak.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Покупал. Но одежду выбирать сложнее — если размер не подходит, приходится возвращать.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. But clothes are harder to choose — if the size doesn't fit, you have to return it.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 不麻烦。现在很多商家都免费退换。
sentences.pinyin: Bù máfan. Xiànzài hěn duō shāngjiā dōu miǎnfèi tuìhuàn.
sentences.text_translation: Mashaqqatli emas. Hozir ko'p sotuvchilar bepul qaytarib almashtiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не хлопотный. Сейчас многие продавцы делают возврат и обмен бесплатно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not at all. These days many sellers offer free returns and exchanges.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你觉得网上购物最大的好处是什么？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ juéde wǎngshàng gòuwù zuì dà de hǎochù shì shénme?
sentences.text_translation: Unda seningcha onlayn xaridning eng katta foydasi nima?
sentences.text_translation_ru: А в чём, по-твоему, главное преимущество онлайн-покупок?
sentences.text_translation_en: So what do you think is the biggest advantage of online shopping?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 价格便宜，选择多，还可以比价。
sentences.pinyin: Jiàgé piányi, xuǎnzé duō, hái kěyǐ bǐjià.
sentences.text_translation: Narxi arzon, tanlov ko'p, narxlarni ham solishtirsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Цены ниже, выбор большой, и можно сравнивать цены.
sentences.text_translation_en: Prices are cheaper, there's more choice, and you can compare prices.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 那你以后还会去商场买东西吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nà nǐ yǐhòu hái huì qù shāngchǎng mǎi dōngxi ma?
sentences.text_translation: Unda kelajakda ham do'konga xarid qilish uchun borasanmi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тогда ты ещё будешь ходить за покупками в магазин?
sentences.text_translation_en: So will you still go to the mall to shop in the future?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 也会。有些东西还是亲眼看看比较好。
sentences.pinyin: Yě huì. Yǒuxiē dōngxi háishì qīnyǎn kàn kan bǐjiào hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Boraman ham. Ba'zi narsalarni o'z ko'zing bilan ko'rgan yaxshiroq.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Буду. Некоторые вещи всё же лучше посмотреть своими глазами.
sentences.text_translation_en: I will. Some things are still better to see with your own eyes.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你说得对。我一般买书和日用品在网上买。
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì. Wǒ yìbān mǎi shū hé rìyòngpǐn zài wǎngshàng mǎi.
sentences.text_translation: To'g'ri aytasan. Men odatda kitob va kundalik ehtiyoj mollarini internetdan olaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты прав. Я обычно покупаю книги и товары повседневного спроса в интернете.
sentences.text_translation_en: You're right. I usually buy books and daily necessities online.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，这些东西不用担心大小问题。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, zhèxiē dōngxi búyòng dānxīn dàxiǎo wèntí.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, bunday narsalarda o'lcham muammosidan xavotirlanish shart emas.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, с такими вещами не нужно переживать из-за размера.
sentences.text_translation_en: Right, with those you don't have to worry about size.
sentences.speaker: B
